node.statement: Setup and spectral bounds. Phi is unital positive on B(H)_sa, so by GT-positive-unital Phi(I)=I and ||Phi||=1 in the order-unit norm. Put S:=2Phi-I in End(B(H)_sa). Then ||S|| <= 2||Phi||+||I|| = 3, and S^2-I=(2Phi-I)^2-I=4Phi^2-4Phi=4(Phi^2-Phi), so by def almost-idempotent ||S^2-I||=4||Phi^2-Phi|| <= 4 eta.
